example: Ali was excited to start kindergarten and learn new things.
zh: 幼稚園，學齡前的教育階段
ja: 幼稚園、小学校入学前の教育段階

example: George chose a backpack that could hold the most stuff.
zh: 背包，通常指學生用的書包
ja: リュックサック、学生が使うバッグ

example: In kindergarten, you need exactly three rulers.
She brought binoculars to see far away objects.
ja: 双眼鏡、遠くを見るための道具

example: We used pipe cleaners for our craft project in kindergarten.
zh: 毛根棒，常用於手工藝品製作
ja: パイプクリーナー、手芸に使う柔らかいワイヤー

example: George was the official guest monkey at the school.
ja: ゲストモンキー、特別な来客の猿

example: During circle time, the children share stories and learn together.
zh: 圓圈時間，幼兒園中孩子們圍坐一起的活動時間
ja: サークルタイム、幼稚園で子供たちが輪になって行う活動時間

example: The castle was surrounded by a deep moat filled with water.
zh: 護城河，環繞城堡的水溝

example: The janitor helped keep the school clean and safe.
ja: 用務員、学校や建物の管理人

example: George used a school tool as a construction level to build the castle.
zh: 水平儀，建築用來測量水平的工具
ja: 水平器、建築で水平を測る道具

example: Using your imagination can help you create wonderful things.
